info.title: Essenza Access Control API
info.description: API para gestión de control de acceso, permisos, roles, usuarios y navegación

tags.name: User Policy Assignment
tags.description: APIs for assigning policies to users

get.description: Returns a role by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing role by ID

get.description: Returns a role-permission by permissionId and roleId

put.description: Updates an existing role-permission by composite key

delete.description: Deletes a role-permission relation by composite key

get.description: Retrieve a specific policy by its ID
Returns a permission by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing permission by ID
Deactivates a company's license for an application
Activates a company's license for an application

get.description: Returns an application by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing application by ID

get.description: Returns an application category by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing application category by ID

delete.description: Deletes an application category by ID

post.description: Assign a policy to a specific user

get.description: Returns all roles. Optional filter by name
Returns all role-permission relations. Optional filters: roleId, permissionId
Retrieve all policies for a specific application
Returns all permissions. Supports optional filters: name, aplicationsId, moduleAplicationId

post.description: Creates a new license for a company to use an application
Quick assign application to company with default settings

delete.description: Removes company's access to an application

post.description: Evaluate if a user is authorized to perform an action on a resource

get.description: Retrieve all active policies assigned to a user
Returns all applications assigned to a specific company
Returns only active applications for a company

delete.description: Remove a policy assignment from a user
